feed.title: Howl Street — Global Financial Wire
feed.subtitle: Loudest Howls and the Pack — auto-curated from 100+ global sources.

entry.title: [LOUDEST HOWL] Oil prices rise despite Iran’s proposal to reopen Strait of Hormuz #HowlStreet #GlobalMarkets
entry.summary: Brent crude rises more than 1 percent despite Iran's offer to reopen waterway in exchange for deferral of nuclear talks.

entry.title: PAL profit up 2.6% in turbulent first quarter #HowlStreet #GlobalMarkets
entry.summary: MANILA, Philippines — Philippine Airlines (PAL) weathered a turbulent first quarter to log a 2.6-percent increase in net income, which reached to $78.55 million. This as passenger traffic continued to grow despite airspace disruptions and rising fuel costs linked to the war in the Middle East. READ: PAL seeks wider Alaska Airlines tie-up In a

entry.title: Atlas Mining turns around with P645-M profit in Q1 #HowlStreet #GlobalMarkets
entry.summary: MANILA, Philippines — Atlas Consolidated and Mining and Development Corp. reported a net income of P645 million in the first quarter of 2025. This reversed a net loss of P404 million a year ago, driven by higher metal prices. In a disclosure on Tuesday, Atlas Mining said revenues rose by 11 percent to P4.51 billion.

entry.title: Peso touches new low of 60.97:$1 in AM trade; 61.08:$1 in PM session #HowlStreet #GlobalMarkets
entry.summary: UPDATED FOR AFTERNOON TRADING MANILA, Philippines — The Philippines’s peso slid to a record low on Tuesday, breaching the 61-per-dollar level for the first time in intraday trading READ: Peso depreciates to 60.48:$1 on Middle East war jitters In the afternoon session, the local currency touched an intraday low of 61.08, marking a fresh all-time

entry.title: Apollo Global Capital expands mining business #HowlStreet #GlobalMarkets
entry.summary: MANILA, Philippines — Holding firm Apollo Global Capital Inc. has inked a deal with Masbate 2145 Philippines Inc. to significantly expand its presence in the local mining industry. The listed firm signed the operating agreement with Masbate 2145 through its offshore mining subsidiary, JDVC Resources Corp. The agreement covers a 15,909.33-hectare mineral property situated in

entry.title: Hotel101 Madrid racks up P387M bookings in strong debut #HowlStreet #GlobalMarkets
entry.summary: MANILA, Philippines — Hotel101-Madrid has generated over 45,000 room night bookings worth 5.44 million euros (about P387 million), signaling strong demand since opening in March. In a disclosure on Tuesday, the company founded by tycoons Tony Tan Caktiong and Edgar “Injap” Sia II said the 680-hotel room is now producing recurring revenues. This marks a

entry.title: RCBC Q1 net income up 12% to P2.7B #HowlStreet #GlobalMarkets
entry.summary: MANILA, Philippines — Rizal Commercial Banking Corp. (RCBC) reported a 12-percent increase in first-quarter 2026 profit. This was attributed to core business expansion and lower funding costs. The Yuchengco-led bank said on Tuesday that its net income reached P2.7 billion. READ: RCBC profit rises 11% to P10.6B in 2025 Net interest income rose 25 percent

entry.title: Vedanta shares down 5% after demerger record date announcement — Tactical reset or value-buying opportunity? #HowlStreet #GlobalMarkets
entry.summary: While Vedanta stock has seen a sharp surge in its stock price of almost 80% in a year in expectation of the demerger, it has faced selling pressure since the record date was declared.

entry.title: DeFi United unveils plan to restore rsETH after $292 million Kelp DAO exploit #HowlStreet #GlobalMarkets
entry.summary: The restoration process involves converting ETH into rsETH in tranches, which will then be transferred to the affected lockbox contract.

entry.title: BP profits more than double as Iran war sends oil prices higher #HowlStreet #GlobalMarkets
entry.summary: The energy giant said it had seen an "exceptional" performance at its oil trading business.

entry.title: Noida International Airport gets BCAS nod for aerodrome safety plan #HowlStreet #GlobalMarkets
entry.summary: Noida International Airport, a greenfield project coming up at Jewar in Uttar Pradesh's Gautam Buddh Nagar district, is among the country's major infrastructure initiatives aimed at boosting regional connectivity and economic growth

entry.title: Nippon Express shares soar after Elliott discloses latest Japan stake #HowlStreet #GlobalMarkets
entry.summary: Nippon Express shares soar after Elliott discloses latest Japan stake

entry.title: ₹1.25 to ₹122.20: Multibagger penny stock turns ₹1 lakh into ₹98 lakh in six years #HowlStreet #GlobalMarkets
entry.summary: The share price of Websol Energy System, which was once priced at ₹1.25 in April 2020, is now trading at ₹122 on the NSE. Here's share price trend and investment growth of the multibagger penny stock.

entry.title: Indonesia commuter train crash toll rises to 14 as rescuers complete evacuation #HowlStreet #GlobalMarkets
entry.summary: Indonesia commuter train crash toll rises to 14 as rescuers complete evacuation

entry.title: Korea Passes UK to Become World’s Eighth-Largest Stock Market #HowlStreet #GlobalMarkets
entry.summary: South Korea has leapfrogged the UK to become the world’s eighth-biggest stock market, fueled by a high-octane rally in its artificial intelligence-linked technology champions.

entry.title: Vodafone Idea, SEPC, Suzlon Energy, Orient Green Power among the most traded stocks today, 28 April 2026 #HowlStreet #GlobalMarkets
entry.summary: Vodafone Idea, SEPC, Suzlon Energy, Orient Green Power Company, HCC, and Jaiprakash Power Ventures (JP Power)  were the most traded stocks, or most active stocks in volume, on the NSE on 28 April.

entry.title: USD/INR boards fresh rally as oil prices remain elevated #HowlStreet #GlobalMarkets
entry.summary: The Indian Rupee (INR) weakens further after a brief pause against the US Dollar (USD) in the opening session on Tuesday. The USD/INR pair jumps to near 94.50 as elevated oil prices continue to hurt the Indian Rupee.

entry.title: Northern council head, five others arrested on suspicion of bribery #HowlStreet #GlobalMarkets
entry.summary: Police allege suspects were part of scam involving computer service contractors who offered kickbacks to secure tenders in several local municipalities The post Northern council head, five others arrested on suspicion of bribery appeared first on The Times of Israel .

entry.title: Oil prices up 2% as no end to Iran war stand-off seems in sight #HowlStreet #GlobalMarkets
entry.summary: Oil prices up 2% as no end to Iran war stand-off seems in sight
